checkedClaims.claimText: Ruliology motivates the study of rule families and their consequences, which makes local exploration of nearby alternatives a productive organizing principle for the library [WOLFRAM-2026].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: ruliology motivates the study of rule families and their consequences which makes local exploration of nearby alternatives a productive organizing principle for the library wolfram-2026
checkedClaims.note: Supports claims that ruliology studies rules and their consequences.

checkedClaims.claimText: Ruliology contributes the orientation toward spaces of possible rules and the consequences they generate [WOLFRAM-2026].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: ruliology contributes the orientation toward spaces of possible rules and the consequences they generate wolfram-2026

checkedClaims.claimText: Ruliology studies what abstract rules do and how spaces of possible rules are organized [WOLFRAM-2026].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: ruliology studies what abstract rules do and how spaces of possible rules are organized wolfram-2026

checkedClaims.claimText: That neighborhood perspective is what makes the framework ruliological in an operational sense: it treats nearby spaces of possible rules as objects of study instead of rushing toward a single prematurely reified interpretation [WOLFRAM-2026].
checkedClaims.normalizedClaim: that neighborhood perspective is what makes the framework ruliological in an operational sense it treats nearby spaces of possible rules as objects of study instead of rushing toward a single prematurely reified interpretation wolfram-2026
